summary: Frontend-only re-test after hero refactor (scroll-driven cinematic camera + sticky canvas + removed Rig Control panel). All 9 requested behaviours verified. Camera framing visibly changes between overview (scrollY=0) and show view (scrollY≈1.5*vh). Headline opacity fades from 1 → ~0.37 while scrolling. Old control-panel/toggle-lights/toggle-beat/truss-height-slider testids are fully removed. Scrolling is NOT trapped — reachable scrollY=5330 with footer in viewport. Quote form validation + success flow (sonner toasts + status text) still work.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx now ~600 lines — still recommended to split Navbar/Hero/Services/Work/About/Quote/Footer into src/components/landing/*.jsx for maintainability.

THREE.Clock deprecation warning logged: 'THREE.Clock: This module has been deprecated. Please use THREE.Timer instead.' This originates from @react-three/fiber internals; upgrade fiber when a version using THREE.Timer is available (informational only, not a bug).
Hero scroll listener attaches to window scroll with { passive: true } — good. useEffect cleanup properly removes listener. onScroll() invoked once at mount so opacity is initialized to '1' at top.
CameraRig uses smoothstep easing (p*p*(3-2*p)) with cam.position.lerp(tp, 0.08) — nice and smooth. tt.lerpVectors + cam.lookAt(tt) works fine without OrbitControls.

html { scroll-behavior: smooth } is active — anchor nav (nav-quote-btn) works but scrollY sampled 1.5s after click can still be mid-scroll; not a bug, just something for future testing agents to know.
Prototype quote form is intentionally client-side (sonner toast only, no persistence) — expected per spec, not a bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero is a 230vh scroll container (h-[230vh]) with a sticky child (top-0 h-[100svh]) that hosts the R3F Canvas. scrollRef (a useRef) is passed into StageScene → CameraRig which lerps the camera between preset A (0,9.5,23) and preset B (7.5,2.2,11.5) based on 0..1 progress across the hero container. headlineRef opacity is inline-styled to Math.max(0, 1 - p*2.2) and hintRef to Math.max(0, 1 - p*4). Old ControlPanel + related testids (control-panel, toggle-lights-btn, toggle-beat-btn, truss-height-slider) are permanently removed. To sample scroll position programmatically use { behavior: 'instant' } because global scroll-behavior is 'smooth'. Full document height ≈ 6410px at 1920x1080; max scrollable = 5330. THREE.Clock deprecation is a harmless warning from @react-three/fiber.

verified_behaviours.document_scrollable_to_bottom: scrollY reaches 5330 (max) and footer bounding rect enters viewport
verified_behaviours.success_submit_toast: Quote request received — we'll be in touch. Prototype: data is not stored yet.

rca of the issue: No bugs found. All acceptance criteria of iteration_2 (scroll-driven camera, sticky canvas, removed control panel, fading headline, unchanged sections/form) verified via Playwright + visual screenshot diff.
